name: flet-mobile-preview

metadata.name: flet-mobile-preview
metadata.summary: A simple phone preview for Flet applications

documentation:
# flet_mobile_preview

`flet_mobile_preview` is a Python package that provides a preview of an iPhone 13 interface using the Flet framework. This package allows you to simulate the appearance of an iPhone 13 on your desktop, making it easier to design and test mobile interfaces.

## Installation

You can install the package using pip:

```bash
pip install flet-mobile-preview
```

## Usage

Here is an example of how to use the `flet_mobile_preview` package:

```python
import flet as ft
from flet_mobile_preview.iPhone import iPhone13

def main(page: ft.Page):
    phone = iPhone13(page)
    phone.screen.appbar = ft.AppBar(
        bgcolor="bleu",
        title=ft.Text("Hello App", color="white"),
    )
    phone.screen.content = ft.Container(
        content=ft.Text("Hello, World!", size=20),
    )
    phone.run()

ft.app(target=main)
```

## Features

- Simulate the appearance of an iPhone 13 on your desktop.
- Zoom in and out to adjust the preview size.
- Minimize, update, and close the preview window.
- Customize the title bar and phone bar colors.

## License

This project is licensed under the MIT License. See the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please open an issue or submit a pull request on GitHub.

## Author

This package is developed by [Victoire243](https://github.com/Victoire243).

## Acknowledgements

Special thanks to @Salakhddinov for giving the idea to create this package.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the iPhone13 class.

Args:
    page (ft.Page): The Flet page object.
    zoom (int): The zoom level (0 for small, 1 for large).

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__initialize_zoom
documentation: Initialize dimensions based on the zoom level.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__body
documentation:
Create the body of the phone.

Returns:
    ft.Container: The body container.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__title_bar
documentation:
Create the title bar with control buttons.

Returns:
    ft.WindowDragArea: The title bar area.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__zoom_out
documentation:
Zoom out to smaller dimensions.

Args:
    e: The event object.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__zoom_in
documentation:
Zoom in to larger dimensions.

Args:
    e: The event object.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__minimize
documentation:
Minimize the window.

Args:
    e: The event object.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__phone_bar
documentation:
Create the phone bar with time and icons.

Returns:
    ft.Container: The phone bar container.

methods.name: flet_mobile_preview.iPhone.iPhone13.__frame
documentation:
Create the frame with body and phone bar.

Returns:
    ft.Stack: The frame stack.
A class to simulate the appearance of an iPhone 13 using the Flet framework.
